personal.name: Sai Pranav S R
personal.summary: Full-stack Computer Science undergraduate experienced in building end-to-end web and AI-driven applications using React and FastAPI. Skilled in REST API design, async backend systems, database management, and AI integration. Comfortable owning features across frontend, backend, and deployment workflows.

projects.title: PayFluxa
projects.subtitle: Financial Service Platform
projects.description: Built full-stack platform with FastAPI backend using Pydantic, SQLAlchemy, Uvicorn for scalable API services and async request handling. Integrated Gemini API and Supabase for data storage, validation, and real-time processing.

projects.title: MindBridge
projects.subtitle: AI Content Application
projects.description: Developed end-to-end AI application with React frontend and FastAPI backend for dynamic content generation. Designed REST APIs and managed data flow between frontend, backend, Supabase, and AI services.

projects.title: Famlytics
projects.subtitle: Data Management System
projects.description: Built full-stack dashboard with reusable components and structured UI for managing user data. Implemented REST API integration and database schema for efficient data processing and retrieval.

projects.title: Dial-To-Grow
projects.subtitle: Voice-First AI Rural Empowerment Platform
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered multilingual voice platform enabling rural users to access mentorship, government services, and career guidance through conversational AI. Built scalable voice-based workflows with real-time translation, mentor matching, AI moderation, and offline accessibility features for inclusive digital empowerment.

projects.title: Walmart AI Shopping Assistant
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Smart Retail Platform
projects.description: Built an AI-first shopping platform enhancing retail experiences through personalized recommendations, voice assistance, AR virtual try-ons, and collaborative family shopping. Integrated real-time product support, AI-driven meal planning, image-based product search, and seamless checkout workflows for an interactive and frictionless e-commerce experience.

projects.title: CivicSense
projects.subtitle: Urban Policy Simulation & Digital Twin Platform
projects.description: Developed a ward-level digital twin platform enabling urban planners to simulate and evaluate policy interventions through real-time infrastructure modeling and traffic impact analysis. Implemented AI-assisted scenario simulation, route-risk evaluation, and interactive geospatial visualization using graph-based urban network analysis.
